StatDef.label: instructive ability
StatDef.description: A multiplier to the amount of skill experience and learning conveyed to those who take lessons from or watch the work of this character.

StatDef.label: hemogen yield
StatDef.description: The density of hemogen in this character's blood. At higher values, bloodfeeders will gain more hemogen per feeding from this character, and medical extraction of hemogen packs will incur less blood loss.

StatDef.label: recycling speed
StatDef.description: The speed at which this person recycles various forms of trash.\n\nSince recycling is dumb labor, recycling speed is not affected by any skill.

StatDef.label: mech command range (Deprecated!)
StatDef.description: Currently only exists for hypothetical backend compatibility purposes.

StatDef.label: mech energy usage offset
StatDef.description: An offset to the rate at which a mechanitor's mechanoids consume energy while operating.
